steps.title: Clear the denominators
steps.content:
Multiplying both sides by $28$ keeps the solutions and removes the left denominator.
$$\frac{x-18}{28}=\frac{x-18}{7}$$
$$x-18=4(x-18)$$

steps.title: Solve for the target
steps.content:
Then solve for $x$ and use the requested expression $x+18$.
$$x-18=4x-72$$
$$54=3x$$
$$18=x$$
$$x+18=36$$ The answer is D.
